name: Rock Candy Anyone ??
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and water in a saucepan over low heat until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Do not stir. Allow the mixture to boil for 1 minute.
3. Let it cool for 15 minutes, then pour into a wide-mouthed glass jar.
4. Attach a weight (a paper clip or bead) to one end of a string.
5. Tie the other end of the string to the middle of a pencil so that the string hangs straight when dropped into the jar with the pencil across the top.
6. Allow it to sit for a week or more until crystals form on the string.
After a few days, you should see crystals forming on the string. If needed, gently break the crust on top of the water to help it evaporate. Some crystal growers tap the glass occasionally to encourage further growth. You can also grow them on a stick if desired. Enjoy watching your children (or grandchildren) marvel at how this works! Covering the jar with a layer of cheesecloth helps keep out unwanted particles.
